---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
page-layout: full
toc: false
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    css: cv-styles.css
    page-layout: full
---

::::::::::::::::::::: cv-container
# Alina Schall

**M.Sc. Statistical Sciences**\
Bielefeld University

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Education

::::: cv-item
::: cv-left
**M.Sc. Statistische Wissenschaften**\
Bielefeld University, Germany
:::

::: cv-right
10/2025 – Present
:::
:::::

::::: cv-item
::: cv-left
**B.A. Social Sciences (Minor:Sociology)**\
Bielefeld University, Germany
:::

::: cv-right
10/2021 – 04/2025
:::
:::::

::::: cv-item
::: cv-left
**CUMIN**\
Curriculum zur medizinischen Interessensförderung und interdisziplinären Netzwerkbildung für IT- und naturwissenschaftlichen Nachwuchs 
Bielefeld University, Germany
:::

::: cv-right
03/2026 – Present
:::
:::::


------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Professional Experience

::::: cv-item
::: cv-left
**Social studies at SOKO**\
SOKO (Institution for communication and social studies) - Bielefeld, Germany
:::

::: cv-right
02/2022 – 10/2022
:::
:::::

::::: cv-item
::: cv-left
**Private Statistics Tutor**\
Self-employed, Bielefeld, Germany
:::

::: cv-right
03/2024 – Present
:::
:::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Skills

**Software:** RStudio, Stata, Microsoft Office

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Languages

**German** (native) **Russian** (native) **English**(fluent)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Certifications

**Intercultural competence**\
International Mentoring Programme Bielefeld University

------------------------------------------------------------------------
:::::::::::::::::::::
